chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-806 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Niaz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- Applicant allegedly issued a cheque amounting to Rs.10,50,000/- against an amount paid by complainant to him for purchase of the car, which transaction somehow could not take place and the cheque on presentation was dishonoured, resulting in present FIR against the applicant but almost after six months of the incident. 2. Learned Assistant P.G has submitted that there is nothing on record to show that any sale / purchase agreement of the car between parties had taken place. More so, there is delay of six months in registration of FIR, and therefore mala fide on the part of complainant cannot be ruled out. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 3. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
